entity.summary: Decentralized automated-market-maker exchange on Everscale providing token swaps, liquidity pools, farming, staking, limit trading, cross-exchange routing, and integration APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify FlatQube as a decentralized AMM exchange on Everscale and expose swap, pool, farming, staking, limit-trading, cross-exchange, API, and smart-contract documentation.

evidence.title: Welcome to FlatQube
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies FlatQube as a decentralized AMM exchange powered by Everscale and describes exchange, farming, staking, pool, API, and smart-contract functionality.

evidence.title: FlatQube official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website exposes Swap, Pools, Tokens, Pairs, Farming, Builder, application access, and documentation links.

evidence.title: Make a basic swap
evidence.notes: First-party swap documentation describes wallet connection, token selection, amount entry, swap confirmation, transaction execution, and explorer verification.
